title: Lymecraft Cobblemon
description: Lymecraft's take on Cobblemon! Needed for the Lymecraft Cobblemon server.
body:
Lymecraft's take on the Cobblemon experience! Features most of the best addons from the community, ideal for survival or for our server!

Notable Features Include:
- All 1025 Pokemon thanks to [Complete Cobblemon Collection](https://modrinth.com/datapack/complete-cobblemon-collection-w-legendary-spawns) and [Mega Showdown](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon-mega-showdown)
- Pokemon riding via the new 1.7 update!
- Breeding via [Cobbreeding](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobbreeding)
- Pokemon fighting back via the new 1.7 update!
- Size variations via [CobblemonSizeVariation](https://modrinth.com/mod/bMdS1gMo)
- Many performance optimisations via Sodium and various other mods

The pack is intended for the Lymecraft Cobblemon server, but is not required to play.
